title: Hexcassettes
description: A Hexcasting addon for all your delaying, async, and daemon needs!
body:
Adds a method to delay hexes into the future, with a touch of playfulness and whimsy!

You can also use this to pass data between hexes, display information by abusing the user  interface, or even create passive effects by having a hex quine itself over and over until it eats up your media and kills you.
